content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Soft Drinking". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/151/A
content.inputFormat: Five integers: n, k, l, c and d, each on a new line
content.outputFormat: The maximum number of liters of soft drink that can be made

solution.approach: Calculate the minimum number of liters that can be made with the given ingredients and then divide by the number of people

code.Python3:
n, k, l, c, d = map(int, input().split())
print(min((k * l) // (n * c), d // n))
